title: Export snapshot manifest and scratch history for operator review
problem: Default export-public overwrites gitignored scratch JSON without retained history or a documented export_schema_version bump workflow, making pre-publish review harder.
acceptance_criteria: Mock default export-public still writes only data/exports/ latest trio unless --publish or fixture-mode.
Each scratch export appends snapshot_manifest.json and a history copy unless --no-snapshot-history.
Retention cap prunes oldest history bundles deterministically.
export_schema_version bump checklist documented for operators.
Safety audit passes with history directories present.
Golden and full pytest pass in mock mode.
non_goals: Do not add new public JSON fields.
Do not fix npm/execute-safe Windows subprocess (separate ticket).
Do not use live Ollama or live smoke.
rollback_plan: Revert ticket-055 branch; delete local data/exports/history and snapshot_manifest.json.
